name: beta=0.10 A=0.24 mid-band stable-chimera control (absorption-grade)
description: Deferred mid-band control for the beta=0.10 robustness slice. A=0.24 sits well inside the stable stationary-chimera band (A_SN=0.178 < 0.24 < A_H=0.278), further from the saddle-node than the A=0.2 secondary control (which sits close to A_SN and was only 28-60% persistent). This run converts the marginal never-absorber control into a clean one. Same integrator, labels, and tracer as absorption.beta010.config.json; only the sweep changes. Rows carry campaign='beta010-A024-v1'.

model._note: Identical to absorption.beta010.config.json so labels reproduce by the same cadence.

sweeps.label: A_midband
sweeps._note: Mid-band stable-chimera control (deferred item 3). 50 seeds x {8,64} at beta=0.10.
